# AMTECH AI

> AMTECH builds AI "employees" that automate the operations brain of inventory-, repair-, and transaction-rich small businesses — purchasing, forecasting, quoting, margin review, and owner briefings.

## Knowledge graph (Open Knowledge Format)

- [OKF bundle index](https://amtechai.com/okf/index.md): machine-readable knowledge graph of AMTECH articles and operational playbooks, with the relationships between them.

## Key pages

- [Articles hub](https://amtechai.com/articles): the AMTECH operations-AI learning library.
- [All articles & knowledge map](https://amtechai.com/articles/all): full index of published articles and planned operational nodes.

## Free AMTECH agent skills

- [Agent skills hub](https://amtechai.com/skills): free AMTECH skills that can be used from one link.
- [OKF Audit Skill](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit): A consumable AMTECH skill for auditing articles, websites, drafts, sitemaps, and OKF bundles for AI-readable knowledge quality.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/use.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/048c371ce966b328eaef29788dc7b29bf27fe166/skills/okf-audit)
- [Knowledge Graph Builder](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder): A consumable AMTECH skill that generates a large knowledge graph for SEO and AI-readable content from a business, website, product, or topic.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/use.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/048c371ce966b328eaef29788dc7b29bf27fe166/skills/knowledge-graph-builder)
- [Estimate Skill](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate): A consumable AMTECH skill that builds a clean, structured job estimate from a described job and the rates you provide.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate/use.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/048c371ce966b328eaef29788dc7b29bf27fe166/skills/estimate)
- [Article Research Writer](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer): A consumable AMTECH skill that researches, plans, and drafts an information-gain article brief from a topic, notes, and sources.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer/use.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/048c371ce966b328eaef29788dc7b29bf27fe166/skills/amtech-article-research-writer)

## Published articles

- [How to Build a Business Brain for Free Before You Hire an AI Consultant](https://amtechai.com/articles/business-brain-free): A practical owner guide for organizing business knowledge, records, examples, rules, and approvals before building an AI employee or custom automation system.
- [What AI Agents See When They Read Your Website](https://amtechai.com/articles/what-ai-agents-see-when-they-read-your-website): Most web content scores around 12/30 when audited for agent-readability. This walkthrough explains all six OKF rubric dimensions, scores a real AMTECH article, and names the five infrastructure gaps most publishers need to fix.
- [Use ChatGPT or Claude to Build a Local SEO Plan That Out-Ranks Bigger Competitors](https://amtechai.com/articles/build-local-seo-plan-with-chatgpt): Give ChatGPT or Claude your services, local conditions, and buyer questions. Turn the output into a knowledge graph, publish answer-first pages, and become the source AI search wants to cite.
- [Build a Claude Skill That Helps You Price Jobs Like a Pro](https://amtechai.com/articles/build-claude-skill-job-pricing): A plain-English guide for Claude users who want to create a reusable job profitability skill for pricing local service work.
- [AMTECH vs. ChatGPT or Claude: What’s the Difference?](https://amtechai.com/articles/amtech-vs-chatgpt-claude): A practical comparison for small-business owners deciding whether they need a general AI chat tool or a custom AI employee built around their business.
- [Create an Estimate With ChatGPT](https://amtechai.com/articles/create-estimate-with-chatgpt): A contractor-focused guide to creating professional estimates with ChatGPT and similar AI tools.
- [Write a Pressure Washing Estimate With AI](https://amtechai.com/articles/write-pressure-washing-estimate-with-ai): A copy-paste prompt and practical workflow for creating pressure washing estimates with AI tools.
- [Estimate Painting Cost With AI](https://amtechai.com/articles/estimate-painting-cost-ai): How painting contractors can use AI to calculate, structure, and write a professional painting estimate.
- [How Independent Stores Use AI to Turn Three Seasons of Sales Data Into Better Owner Decisions](https://amtechai.com/articles/garden-center-spring-buy-plan-ai): A plain-English AI walkthrough for Salisbury, MD garden centers, hardware stores, supply shops, salons, bakeries, and other independent retailers using past sales data to plan the next season.
- [What Is OKF? Google's New Format For AI-Readable Knowledge](https://amtechai.com/articles/what-is-okf-ai-readable-knowledge): OKF is a simple way to package knowledge so AI agents can read it. Here is how markdown concept files become a graph, why AMTECH treats OKF as one output of a larger publishing system, and how to score your own content with the free OKF Audit Skill.
